_comment: Mutation testing scoped to pure-function modules (calculators, conversions, validation). Service/mapper/index modules are excluded from this opt-in run because their I/O-heavy mocking makes mutation runs slow. Run with: npm run mutation-test
_comment_vitest: Vitest auto-discovers vitest.config.ts in the sandbox; explicit configFile path can fail to resolve when Stryker copies files into .stryker-tmp/. `related: false` runs the full suite per mutant: needed because vitest's related-test heuristic does not always pick up the relevant tests when sources import .js extensions but live as .ts files.
_comment_checkers: typescript-checker is disabled here to keep the opt-in mutation run fast. Re-enable by adding `"checkers": ["typescript"]` and `"tsconfigFile": "tsconfig.json"` if a future run uncovers mutants that the typechecker would have caught.
